subject: UGC concept for Wave Hotel's art and pool
body:
A 50,000-square-foot sculpture garden anchored by di Modica's Charging Bull is one of the most visually distinct settings in Orlando — and most hotels never show it properly on social.

I'm Mal, an Orlando-based UGC creator producing photo and video for hospitality brands. Portfolio: https://worldwidewmal.com.

For Wave Hotel, I'd shoot a 30-second ambient lifestyle Reel: open on the rooftop pool's turquoise palm sculptures at golden hour, transition through the sculpture garden, close on the BACÁN dining room. One continuous mood that shows guests exactly what the property feels like — something a static ad can't replicate.

Would this be useful for your content calendar?

— Mal
